pi_items.source: Checked export_result.sh and task.json instructions. The output file path explicitly ends with mold_cavity.FCStd.

Checked verifier.py logic all(m > b + 18 for m, b in zip(mold_bbox, bracket_bbox)). The requirement is at least 10mm on each side (total 20mm), but the verifier allows a 2mm tolerance (checking > 18).
Checked verifier.py logic where 40 <= transparency <= 60 and the prompt requests exactly 50%.
Checked verifier.py logic which requires the transparency to be within the 40 to 60 range, meaning a tolerance of 10 around the target 50%.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the data is a real FreeCAD sample (T8_housing_bracket.FCStd) from the FreeCAD-library GitHub repository. Confirmed the expected output file name is 'mold_cavity.FCStd', the transparency is expected to be 50 with a tolerance of 10 (verifier accepts 40 to 60), and the minimum margin is 10.0mm (verifier explicitly requires the mold bounding box to be > 18mm larger than the bracket's bounding box in all dimensions, allowing a 1mm tolerance per side).
